paperTitle: GeoPredict: Leveraging Predictive Kinematics and 3D Gaussian Geometry for Precise VLA Manipulation
organization: CUHK Shenzhen / Hunan University / Voyager Research, Didi Chuxing

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 98 · libero object 98.2 · libero goal 95.7 · libero 10 94 | Table 2 | Notes: Standard LIBERO protocol: 4 suites, 50 demos per task, 500 trials per suite. Built on pi0 backbone.

benchmarks.label: RoboCasa
benchmarks.detail: Suites: panda 52.4 | Table 1 | Notes: 24 tasks, Human-50 setting (50 demos/task), 50 trials per task across 5 scenes.
